This is a generated file associated with the InfoBlock component, part of the marketing webapp template built on Next.js. As a `.generated` module, it holds artifacts produced by a GraphQL code generation process, rather than hand-authored component logic or markup.

Its known connections are limited to the ctf-asset generated module, from which it imports both the `AssetFieldsFragment` type and the corresponding `AssetFieldsFragmentDoc` document. This indicates that the InfoBlock component's generated GraphQL layer depends on shared asset field definitions, allowing it to type and query asset data consistently with other parts of the template that also consume the ctf-asset fragment.

# Relations

- [Ctf Asset.Generated](ctf-asset.generated.md) — Reuses shared asset field types for info block content {kind: sync}
- [Ctf Asset.Generated](ctf-asset.generated.md) — Reuses shared asset query fragment for info block content {kind: sync}
